hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; PATTERNS="sk-ant-|sk-proj-|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}|xoxb-|xoxp-|hooks\.slack\.com|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA )?PRIVATE KEY-----|AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}|ya29\.[0-9A-Za-z_-]+|eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\.eyJ"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "$PATTERNS"; then echo "{\"message\": \"WARNING: Possible hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead.\", \"blocked\": true}"; fi'
